lumpSum.name: Lump Sum
lumpSum.description: Invest all capital in one go at the start. Suitable if you have immediate availability and want to maximize market exposure right away.

pac.name: DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging)
pac.description: Invest fixed amounts at regular intervals. Reduces volatility impact through dollar-cost averaging and allows gradual portfolio building.

projection.title: Future Projection
projection.subtitle: Statistical estimate of future portfolio value based on historical data

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.text: Past performance does not guarantee future returns. This is a statistical projection based on historical data, NOT a forecast or investment recommendation.
disclaimer.warning: WARNING: The projections shown are for illustrative purposes only and do NOT constitute financial advice.
disclaimer.assumption1: Future performance will be similar to historical performance
disclaimer.assumption2: Volatility will remain constant over time
disclaimer.assumption3: Does not consider extreme events or economic crises
disclaimer.assumption4: Does not include future transaction costs, taxes or fees
disclaimer.risk1: Markets may behave completely differently from the past
disclaimer.risk2: Projections become less reliable over long time horizons
disclaimer.risk3: Unforeseen events can cause very different results
disclaimer.risk4: Invested capital is always at risk of loss
disclaimer.advice: Always consult a professional financial advisor before making investment decisions. This tool is educational only.
